verse_text: I thank God that I baptized none of you except Crispus and Gaius,

pericope.title: The Message of Unity: Exaltation of the Cross

links.context: This is probably not the same Gaius mentioned in [[ROM.16:23]] and [[1CO.1:14]], [[1CO.1:15]].
Gaius, from Asia Minor (20:4) is perhaps the same person mentioned in [[ROM.16:23]] and [[1CO.1:14]]. Aristarchus is a Thessalonian (20:4; [[COL.4:10]]).
